title: Empowering Nonprofits Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.
subjects: Social work, volunteer service, charitable organizations
crs_summary: Empowering Nonprofits Act This bill reduces cost-sharing requirements for grants directly awarded to certain nonprofit organizations for the five years following the bill's enactment. Eligible nonprofit organizations are those located in a U.S. state (including the District of Columbia or a U.S. commonwealth, territory, or possession) or federally recognized Indian tribe that has more than 20% of individuals living below the poverty line. Specifically, the bill requires an executive agency, during that time frame, to reduce any cost-sharing requirement by 25% for grants made directly to an eligible nonprofit.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.
